intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“地中海阳光 -> 英国退休梦 -> 快速买房 -> 天气冲击 -> 梦想结束”的故事链读顺。注意 past perfect 的 had lived / had dreamed / had planned，也要读出 immediately、continually、bitterly 的情绪变化。

sentences.text: My old friend, Harrison, had lived in the Mediterranean for many years before he returned to England.
sentences.focus_zh: had lived 表示回英国以前已经住了很多年；Mediterranean 要读成一个完整地名。

sentences.text: He had often dreamed of retiring in England and had planned to settle down in the country.
sentences.focus_zh: had dreamed 和 had planned 读出长期梦想；settle down 是安顿下来。

sentences.text: He had no sooner returned than he bought a house and went to live there.
sentences.focus_zh: no sooner... than... 表示一回来就买房，动作非常快。

sentences.text: Almost immediately he began to complain about the weather, for even though it was still summer, it rained continually and it was often bitterly cold.
sentences.focus_zh: 长句要在 weather 后小停；immediately、continually、bitterly 是这课的情绪中心。

sentences.text: After so many years of sunshine, Harrison got a shock.
sentences.focus_zh: After so many years of sunshine 先读成原因背景；got a shock 是吃了一惊。

sentences.text: He acted as if he had never lived in England before.
sentences.focus_zh: as if 是好像；had never lived 要读出他的反应很夸张。

sentences.text: In the end, it was more than he could bear. He had hardly had time to settle down when he sold the house and left the country.
sentences.focus_zh: more than he could bear 表示超过能忍受的程度；hardly... when... 表示几乎还没安顿就离开。

sentences.text: The dream he had had for so many years ended there. Harrison had thought of everything except the weather.
sentences.focus_zh: the dream he had had 是多年梦想；最后一句要读成安静的讽刺 punchline。
